privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for vscode_env fix_flaky_playwright_tests task by confirming that the target Playwright tests and the underlying Express backend server are synthetically generated and explicitly defined within setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected five tests ('auth.spec.js', 'checkout.spec.js', 'search.spec.js', 'video_player.spec.js', 'profile.spec.js') explicitly match the filenames generated by the setup scripts, and confirmed their anti-gaming logs against the verifier.py criteria.
